project_type: Python FastAPI + Jinja2 multi-agent investment analysis system
test_command: python3 -c "import augur; from augur.data import fetch_market_context, fetch_market_overview; from augur.datasources import default_providers; from dashboard.app import app; print('All imports OK')"
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e '.[data]' 2. Run import checks 3. Start dashboard and verify pages load
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET, Python 3.11 available via pyenv, no Docker needed
contribution_requirements: Commit messages in Chinese, work on main branch directly
key_patterns: FastAPI + Jinja2 templates in dashboard/templates/, CSS in dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css, personas in src/augur/personas/, data layer in src/augur/data.py and src/augur/datasources/
directory_structure: src/augur/ - core library, dashboard/ - FastAPI web UI, dashboard/templates/ - Jinja2 HTML, dashboard/static/css/ - styles, docs/ - documentation, tests/ - pytest tests
